Great bar and place to eat across the street from the Aquatic Cove, which provides great vies of the bay.  The bartenders were top notch and engaging. There is of locals and visitors.  Home of Irish Coffee and the make unique and very good ones.  Just a great place to go

Our first experience in the USA.
What a fab atmosphere in this pub. Posters up to celebrate 50 years of service from Joe who was still happily behind bar. Great Irish coffee.Food was delicious and not silly prices. We had burger and chicken breast with veg. Delicious. Attentive team and totally American greeter with fab personality. Got chatting on shared table as it was busy. A great end to our first day, loved the place.

As a local I can truthfully say that this place is one of the worst and more expensive tourist traps in the city. I only went there because out of town friends wanted to go. I was probably the only local there
